title: Paper Boy
overview: Paper Boy movie is a romantic entertainer directed by Jayashankarr and produced by Sampath Nandi while Bheems Ceciroleo scored music for this movie  Santosh Shoban, Priya Shri, and Tanya Hope are playing the main lead roles in this movie.
